title: AI-Enabled Full Stack Python Developer
description: AI-Enabled Full Stack Python Developer About the Role We are looking for a hands-on AI-enabled Full Stack Python Developer to design and build data-driven applications enhanced with modern AI/LLM capabilities. This role combines strong software engineering fundamentals with rapid prototyping, AI integration, and business problem solving. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to develop scalable solutions, build internal tools, and deliver high-impact applications leveraging the latest AI technologies. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain full stack applications with a strong focus on Python backend and lightweight frontends Build AI-powered solutions using LLMs (e.g., OpenAI / Azure OpenAI) and prompt engineering techniques Design and develop user interfaces using tools like Streamlit or similar frameworks Integrate with APIs, databases, and external systems Translate business requirements into practical, scalable technical solutions Ensure code quality through testing, debugging, and best engineering practices Collaborate with stakeholders to iterate quickly and deliver value in an agile environment Leverage AI-assisted development tools to enhance productivity and code quality Required Qualifications Minimum 3 years of professional experience in software development Strong proficiency in Python Experience in full stack development (backend + frontend fundamentals) Experience with data processing libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy) Hands-on experience with REST APIs and JSON-based integrations Familiarity with LLM concepts and prompt engineering Experience with OpenAI / Azure OpenAI or similar AI platforms Basic knowledge of SQL and/or NoSQL databases Experience with Git and modern development workflows Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Preferred Qualifications Experience with Streamlit or similar rapid UI frameworks Familiarity with LangChain or similar LLM orchestration tools Understanding of testing frameworks (pytest, unittest) Exposure to CI/CD pipelines Basic knowledge of financial, tax, or accounting domains Experience with AI-assisted coding tools , such as: GitHub Copilot Factory.ai CodeX ClaudeCode What We’re Looking For A builder mindset who enjoys rapid prototyping and iteration Ability to work with ambiguity and evolving requirements Strong communication and collaboration skills Curiosity for emerging AI technologies and continuous learning Ownership and accountability in delivering high-quality solutions

title: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER
description: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde geliştirilen araç takip, IoT ve veri odaklı yazılım projelerinde görev alacak; projelerin frontend ve backend bileşenlerinin geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alacak Senior Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Bu pozisyon; mevcut uygulamaların sürdürülebilirliğini sağlamak, yeni özellikler geliştirmek, performans ve güvenlik iyileştirmeleri yapmak ve projelerin uçtan uca yazılım geliştirme süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak üzere kurgulanmıştır. Adaydan; takım çalışmasına yatkın, analitik düşünebilen, gerçek zamanlı veri işleyen sistemler, IoT entegrasyonları ve yapay zeka destekli uygulamalar üzerinde aktif rol alması beklenmektedir. Senden Neler Bekliyoruz? Senior Full Stack Developer olarak en az 5 yıl profesyonel deneyim Frontend tarafında: HTML, CSS React (tercihen Next.js) ile uygulama geliştirme deneyimi Backend tarafında: C# / .NET Core ile API ve servis geliştirme tecrübesi RESTful API tasarımı ve entegrasyonu konusunda deneyim Veritabanları: MsSQL veya PostgreSQL (tercihen her ikisi) NoSQL sistemler (MongoDB vb.) hakkında temel bilgi Git ve benzeri versiyon kontrol sistemleriyle çalışma deneyimi Gerçek zamanlı veri akışı ve stream tabanlı sistemlerle (WebSocket, MQTT, benzeri) çalışma deneyimi Araç takip sistemleri, IoT projeleri veya telemetri tabanlı uygulamalar üzerinde geliştirme veya entegrasyon tecrübesi Verilerin dashboard, grafik veya rapor formatlarında görselleştirilmesi konusunda deneyim Temel sunucu, ağ ve bulut altyapısı bilgisi (tercihen AWS) Analitik düşünme yeteneği, problem çözme becerisi ve ekip çalışmasına yatkınlık Tercih Sebebi Olabilecek Ek Yetenekler: Docker, Kubernetes gibi konteyner teknolojileriyle çalışma deneyimi CI/CD süreçleri ve DevOps araçları hakkında bilgi Yapay zeka tabanlı uygulamaların backend entegrasyonlarında görev almış olmak Mobil uygulama geliştirme veya entegrasyon deneyimi UX/UI prensiplerine aşinalık Agile/Scrum araçları (Trello vb.) ile çalışma deneyimi

title: Software Engineer, Backend
description: About Codeway Codeway is a global consumer tech company with more than 400M users worldwide. Since 2020, we’ve built and scaled 60+ mobile apps across creativity, productivity, wellness, language learning, and entertainment. Our flagship apps — Retake AI, Cleanup, Learna, and DramaPops — and many of them lead their categories globally. In 2024, we became the most downloaded app publisher on iOS, driven by cutting-edge AI research, sharp data-driven execution, and a relentless focus on product and marketing. We’re a team of 300+ people across İstanbul and Barcelona who bring curiosity, passion, trust, and ownership to everything we build. Recognized as a #1 LinkedIn Top Startup and a Great Place to Work in Europe, Codeway is where ambitious people do their life’s best work. We’re building the next generation of consumer tech and reimagining what mobile apps can be. This is Codeway. This is our way. Join us. POSITION As a Software Engineer, Backend at Codeway, you will design and implement the scalable systems that power products used by millions. You won’t just write code; you will own features end-to-end—from initial system design and AI integration to deployment and production monitoring. Our environment is fast-paced, and we value engineers who can turn complex architectural challenges into simple, elegant, and maintainable solutions. What You’ll Do Design and implement scalable systems. Build high-performance backend architectures for mobile and web clients using Node.js and Python. Own features end-to-end. Take full responsibility for the lifecycle of your services—ideation, implementation, deployment (GCP/Firebase), and continuous optimization. Integrate AI and media workflows. Integrate LLMs and media workflows (STT/TTS, image/video/audio processing), managing model serving, inference performance, and latency/cost tradeoffs. Architect asynchronous workflows. Implement robust event-driven systems using queues and tasks to handle heavy media and AI workloads. Simplify systems. Evaluate every component and process to remove unnecessary complexity and build minimalist, future-proof architectures. Optimize performance. Proactively identify bottlenecks to improve latency, throughput, and costs. Ensure backend quality. Establish robust error handling, security best practices, and end-to-end observability to ensure production reliability. Collaborate cross-functionally. Partner with Mobile, Product, DevOps, and AI teams to design and ship impactful features. What You’ll Bring Experience: 2+ years of professional experience as a Backend Engineer, with a track record of building consumer-facing products at scale. Technical Excellence: Strong proficiency in Node.js and Python with a deep understanding of CS fundamentals, data structures, and algorithms. Infrastructure Knowledge: Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or Firebase, with strong production debugging and observability habits. System Design: A solid grasp of databases, API design, and security best practices. AI Familiarity: Experience deploying and optimizing AI models in production, including familiarity with external AI APIs and their performance considerations. Communication: Proficiency in English with the ability to explain complex engineering decisions and trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical teams. Education: A BS or MS in Computer Science or a related technical field. NICE TO HAVE Experience with GCP tools such as Pub/Sub, Cloud Run, GKE, BigQuery, or Cloud Functions Familiarity with SSE or WebSockets for real-time communication Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines Experience with message brokers like Kafka, RabbitMQ, or SQS What We Offer Great Place to Work. As our top team member, you'll be a part of a fast-growing startup and have the privilege to enjoy our accredited “BEST WORKPLACES” environment, ranked first among all workplaces. A Competitive Compensation Package. Long story short, we take care of you. A Meal Compensation. That is actually enough for a decent & nutritious lunch, we’re not following the industry standard. Full Health Benefits. To keep you away from all the trouble, we provide unlimited private health insurance and cover the HPV vaccine. Pet Adoption Support. We cover the primary healthcare expenses, parasite vaccinations, and microchip costs that may arise within the first year after employees adopt a pet. Cool Tech Stack. Macbook, iPhone 15 Pro, magic mouse, magic keyboard; an adjustable desk with a 4K screen and any other gadget you may need in your job. Sport Activities Support. We care about your physical wellbeing and support your gym membership. Learning Never Ends! Training budget to help you grow in your role, gain new skills, and learn new things. Udemy Free Pass. An unlimited Udemy subscription. Flexible Schedule & Unlimited Vacations. This isn’t a “clock in, clock out” company. We care about your productivity, not tracking every minute you’re on site. It’s up to you to always be responsible with your work, no matter where you are or what schedule you’re keeping. English Course Support. Be more global and perform best at your work. Comprehensive Well-being Support. Through our partnership with Meditopia, we now offer free psychological counseling, along with additional services like dietitian, personal trainer, parenting consultant, physiotherapist, child & adolescent therapist, and face-to-face counseling for employees in Istanbul. A Top-Notch Office. Located at the heart of Istanbul, right next to Levent Metro Station at Ferko Signature. Codebrew. Yes, you’ve heard it right: We love coffee so much that we’ve built our own coffee shop inside our office, where we also provide healthy snacks at certain hours. Free Breakfast. At Codebrew - every morning at 9:30 AM. No Dress Code. Dress as you like. Happy Hours Every Friday. Every. Single. Friday. When it’s 5 PM: Screens off, party on! (Check out Codeway on Instagram) Dream Team. Average Codeway member is young, talented, and passionate - which makes our working environment extremely dynamic. Need proof? Take a look at our Instagram. Gaming Area. Whenever you need to take a break from hard work and relax with your favorite games, our PS5 corner will be waiting for you. Software Support. Subscription to any software you might need to perform at your best. Public Transportation Support. Daily public transportation support is on us, covered by an additional monthly compensation. Parent Support. Becoming a parent is a big moment, and Codeway celebrates it with you. We offer a one-time grant to support our new parents. Massage Room. When you need a moment to recharge and unwind, our massage chair room will be ready to offer you a relaxing break. THE RECRUITING PROCESS We are committed to keeping our recruitment process short and transparent. Here’s how it looks like: Application: Send us your CV or LinkedIn profile. You can also just write a few words about yourself. Case Study: We might send you a task to solve. Talent & Culture Interview: Let’s talk about your experience & expectations and see what we can achieve together. Technical Interview: You will meet with future team lead to go over the case and your technical capabilities in detail. Reference Check: We will contact your references to gain insights into your past experiences and work ethic. Welcome Aboard! You are now a part of the team. Your personal data that will be collected through your applications made due to this advertisement will be processed automatically by the data controller Codeway in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK") and relevant legislation for the purpose of conducting job application processes. You can access detailed information on this matter from the "Candidate Information Notice" page at https://www.codeway.co . Codeway processes the personal data of job applicants in accordance with relevant legislation. " Privacy Notice for Employee Candidate " summarizes the data processing procedures during the application process. Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumlusu Codeway tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla otomatik yollarla işlenecektir. Detaylı bilgiye https://www.codeway.co adresindeki "Aday Aydınlatma Metnimizin" sayfasından ulaşabilirsiniz. Codeway, iş başvurusu yapan adayların kişisel verilerini, ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde işlemektedir. "Çalışan Adayı İçin Gizlilik Bildirimi" başvuru sürecindeki veri işleme süreçlerini özetler. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: MapperX, a pioneer in the renewable energy sector, is dedicated to providing revolutionary solutions in solar panel analysis and aims to enhance energy efficiency. Our software optimizes the performance of solar panels and improves energy production processes. We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our team in Ankara and contribute to this vision. Qualifications: - Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or a related field - At least 3 years of experience in Full Stack Development - Advanced proficiency in React, Next.js (App Router, Server Components), and TypeScript - Strong knowledge of Node.js, Express.js, REST API design, and backend development - Solid experience with Firestore (NoSQL data modeling, queries, security rules) and Firebase Auth (JWT, OTP/2FA) - Proficiency in Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Radix UI component-based development - Experience with state management using Zustand, TanStack Query, and React Hook Form with Zod validation - Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and SOLID principles - Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform, Firebase (Hosting, Functions, Storage), and Cloud Run technologies - Experience with Mapbox GL, Leaflet, or PostGIS for geospatial/map-based applications is a plus - Experience with payment gateway integration (Iyzico or similar 3D Secure flows) is a plus - Familiarity with internationalization frameworks (next-intl) for multi-language applications is a plus - Experience with SendGrid, TipTap/Monaco editors, or PDF generation (@react-pdf/renderer) is a plus Responsibilities: - Develop and maintain features across our customer-facing solar panel analysis platform, backend API, and internal admin panel - Build responsive, accessible UI components and implement REST API endpoints with proper authentication and authorization - Work with Firestore data models, integrate third-party services (payments, email, geospatial APIs), and support 11-language internationalization - Produce innovative software solutions and actively participate in projects that advance solar energy analytics If you are interested in contributing to projects that make a difference in the industry and want to be part of the energy transition, we invite you to apply. Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview. #FullStackDeveloper #ReactJS #NextJS #TypeScript #NodeJS #Firebase #Firestore #WebDevelopment #SoftwareEngineer #postgresql #BackendDeveloper #GoogleCloud #CloudRun #ankara

title: Senior Backend Developer / Tech Lead
description: Senior Backend Developer / Tech Lead Çalışma Şekli: Tam Zamanlı / Ofis Lokasyon: İstanbul / Ataşehir / Şerifali Departman: Yazılım / Teknoloji İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde yeni kurulacak yazılım departmanımız için, yüksek ölçeklenebilirliğe sahip dijital platformların teknik altyapısını tasarlayıp yönetecek bir Senior Backend Developer / Tech Lead arıyoruz. Geliştireceğimiz projeler; farklı sektörlere hitap eden, yoğun veri akışı, güçlü yönetim panelleri, kullanıcı yönetimi, entegrasyon altyapıları ve operasyonel süreçler içeren web tabanlı platformlardan oluşacaktır. Bu pozisyonda görev alacak kişinin yalnızca geliştirme yapması değil, aynı zamanda sistemin teknik temelini sağlam şekilde kurması, backend mimarisini oluşturması ve ekibin teknik yönünü belirlemesi beklenmektedir. Sorumluluklar Geliştirilecek projelerin backend mimarisini tasarlamak ve hayata geçirmek Ölçeklenebilir, sürdürülebilir ve güvenli sistem altyapıları oluşturmak API mimarisi, servis yapıları, veritabanı modeli ve iş akışlarını planlamak Authentication, authorization, rol ve yetkilendirme yapıları kurmak Ödeme sistemleri, ERP, CRM, kargo, bildirim, e-fatura ve benzeri üçüncü parti entegrasyon süreçlerini yönetmek Performans optimizasyonu, cache yapıları, queue sistemleri ve veri akışı mimarisini kurgulamak Kod kalitesi, geliştirme standartları, repository yapısı ve code review süreçlerini oluşturmak Backend ekibine teknik liderlik etmek, görev dağılımı ve yönlendirme sağlamak Frontend, QA ve operasyon ekipleriyle koordineli şekilde ürün geliştirme süreçlerine katkı sunmak CI/CD, test, loglama, monitoring ve temel DevOps süreçlerine teknik destek vermek Sistemlerin uzun vadeli büyümesine uygun teknik kararlar almak Aranan Nitelikler Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun Backend geliştirme alanında minimum 5 yıl deneyim En az bir güçlü backend teknolojisinde ileri seviye bilgi (tercihen Node.js, .NET, Java, Go veya benzeri) REST API geliştirme ve servis mimarileri konusunda güçlü tecrübe PostgreSQL, MySQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanlarında ileri seviye bilgi Veritabanı tasarımı, performans optimizasyonu ve sorgu iyileştirme konularında deneyim Redis, cache mekanizmaları, background job ve queue sistemleri hakkında bilgi Git, branch yönetimi ve code review süreçlerine hakimiyet Yazılım mimarisi, güvenlik, ölçeklenebilirlik ve sürdürülebilirlik konularında güçlü bakış açısı Problem çözme becerisi yüksek, analitik düşünebilen ve teknik sahiplenme duygusu güçlü Takım yönetimi veya teknik mentorluk konusunda deneyimli Tercih Sebebi Olacak Yetkinlikler Mikroservis mimarisi tecrübesi Docker, Kubernetes ve bulut altyapıları konusunda deneyim AWS, GCP veya Azure üzerinde deployment süreçlerinde görev almış olmak Elasticsearch, RabbitMQ, Kafka veya benzeri sistemlerle çalışma deneyimi Yüksek trafikli sistemler, marketplace, SaaS veya e-ticaret platformlarında çalışma tecrübesi Test kültürüne sahip olmak ve otomasyon süreçlerine katkı sağlayabilmek CI/CD süreçleri, monitoring ve logging araçları hakkında deneyim Aradığımız Kişisel Özellikler Sorumluluk alan ve sahiplenici Uzun vadeli bakış açısına sahip Disiplinli ve sonuç odaklı Takım çalışmasına yatkın Hızlı öğrenen ve çözüm üreten Yüksek tempolu çalışma ortamına uyum sağlayabilen Yeni kurulacak bir yapıyı sıfırdan inşa etme motivasyonuna sahip Neler Sunuyoruz Yeni kurulacak güçlü bir yazılım yapılanmasında temel rol alma fırsatı Teknik karar alma ve sistem mimarisine doğrudan yön verme imkanı Uzun vadeli büyüme potansiyeli taşıyan projelerde aktif rol Yetkin ve dinamik bir ekip kurulumunda söz sahibi olma fırsatı Performans ve katkıya dayalı gelişim alanı Uygun aday için, uzun vadeli performans ve katkı doğrultusunda hisse opsiyonu değerlendirilecektir Başvuru ve CV Başvuru sırasında adayların güncel CV’lerini, varsa GitHub profillerini, proje referanslarını veya canlı ürün deneyimlerini paylaşmaları beklenmektedir. CV'lerde adayın doğum tarihi, ikamet ettiği il ve resim eklemesi gerekmektedir.

title: Danışman Laravel-Devops uzmanı
description: Aradığımız uzman Freelance çalışacak ve 7/24 saat sorun olduğunda hemen müdahale edecek kişi olacaktır. İki kişi alınacaktır. Teknoloji odaklı projeler geliştiren ekibimize katılacak, sistemlerin kesintisiz ve güvenli şekilde çalışmasını sağlayacak deneyimli bir Backent (Laravel) ve DevOps Uzmanı arıyoruz. Projelerimizde backent te laravel ve NestJs kullanılmaktadır. CI/CD süreçlerinin yönetimi, sunucu altyapılarının optimizasyonu ve otomasyon çözümlerinin geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alacak ve backent te var olan ve olabilecek sorunları en hızlı şekilde çözecek sorun olmamasını sağlayacak, çıkacak backent ve sunucu sorunlarına anında müdahale edecek ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Projelerimiz Turhost da fiziki sunucularımızda bulunmaktadır. Test ortamı için ve canlı için birer sunucumuz mevcuttur. Uzman arkadaşla yapacağımız sözleşmede belirteceğimiz gibi ay içinde hiç bir hizmet alınmasa veya dört günden az ihtiyaç olsa bile ay sonunda (4) dört günlük 10,000 TL (onbinlira) ödeme yapılacaktır. Eğer ay içinde aldığımız hizmet gün sayısı artarsa gün sayısı x 2500TL olarak ödeme yapılacaktır. Başlangıçta projede yapılacak trello maddeleri ve istenilen sayfalar, mailing, mesaj ve bildirimler yapılacak sonrasında frontend tarafının istedikleri ve seocularımızın talepleri yapılacak ,sorun olduğunda anlık müdahale edip çözecek saat sorunu olmadan ulaşabilecegimiz danışman olarak uzun yıllar devam edebileceğimiz arkadaşların müracaatlarını bekliyoruz. Görev ve Sorumluluklar CI/CD süreçlerini kurmak, yönetmek ve iyileştirmek Sunucu ve altyapı sistemlerinin kurulumu, izlenmesi ve yönetimi Docker, Kubernetes gibi konteyner teknolojileri ile sistemlerin yönetimi Bulut altyapılarında (AWS, GCP, Azure vb.) sistem yönetimi ve optimizasyonu Yazılım geliştirme ekipleri ile koordineli çalışarak deployment süreçlerini hızlandırmak Sistem güvenliği, performans ve ölçeklenebilirlik konularında iyileştirmeler yapmak Monitoring ve loglama sistemlerini kurmak ve yönetmek Aranan Nitelikler DevOps veya Sistem Yönetimi alanında en az 4 yıl deneyim Laravel backentte en az 5 yıl deneyim Linux sunucu yönetimi konusunda bilgi sahibi PostgreSQL deneyimi GraphQL bilgisi CI/CD araçları (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions vb.) konusunda deneyimli Docker ve tercihen Kubernetes bilgisi olan Cloud servisleri (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure) hakkında bilgi sahibi Analitik düşünme yeteneği güçlü, problem çözme becerisi yüksek Takım çalışmasına yatkın Büyük ve karmaşık projelerde çalışma deneyimi Temiz kod yazma prensibine sahip olmak ve güçlü problem çözme becerileri

title: Full Stack Developer
description: 🚀 DRD Filo teknoloji ekibine yeni bir ekip arkadaşı arıyor! Sana biraz bizden bahsedelim; Bizi güçlendiren, onurlandıran, ilklerle dolu 25 yıllık geçmişimizle yenilikçilik heyecanımızı birleştirdik ve bambaşka bir DRD deneyimi yaratmak üzere rotamızı yeniden oluşturduk. Bugün, dünyaya hiç olmadığı kadar farklı, tutkulu ve kendimize has bir yerden bakıyoruz. Müşterisinin güvenini her gün yeniden kazanan en yenilikçi Filo Kiralama markası olmak için yaşıyoruz. DRD hikayesini birlikte yaratmak için heyecan duyan, yaptığı işte ve kendisinde fark yaratmayı hedefleyen, teknolojiye meraklı, esnek ve yaratıcı ekip arkadaşlarıyla, sektörün profesyonelleri tarafından en çok tercih edilen marka olmayı hedefliyoruz. Birlikte başarmayı, paylaşmayı, gelişmeyi ve dönüşmeyi seviyoruz — tabii bir de arabalar bizim ortak tutkumuz! 🚗 Şimdi ise işini tutkuyla yapan bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. 💼 Görev Tanımı: • Filo yönetim sistemleri ve müşteri portallarının uçtan uca geliştirilmesinde aktif rol almak • Monolitik yapıların mikroservis mimarisine dönüşüm süreçlerine katkı sağlamak • İş birimlerinden gelen talepler doğrultusunda teknik analizler yaparak ölçeklenebilir çözümler üretmek • SDLC standartlarına uygun, sürdürülebilir ve temiz kod geliştirmek 🎯 Aranan Nitelikler: • Bilgisayar / Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerden mezun • .NET ekosisteminde (.NET Core, ASP.NET Web API, Entity Framework Core) en az 4 yıl deneyim • Angular veya React ile geliştirme tecrübesi, TypeScript bilgisi • MS SQL Server ve ileri seviye T-SQL bilgisi • Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture ve Design Patterns (CQRS, MediatR vb.) konularında deneyim • RESTful servisler ve 3. parti API entegrasyonları konusunda bilgi • CI/CD süreçleri, Docker ve Kubernetes hakkında deneyim • İyi seviyede İngilizce • Tercihen en az 5 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi 📩 Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz! LinkedIn üzerinden veya kariyer kanallarımız aracılığıyla bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz. #Hiring #FullStackDeveloper #DotNet #Microservices #DRDFilo

title: Backend Developer
description: One platform, unlimited solutions! With its Fintech 2.0 vision, Nakitera is digitizing your financial processes. Nakitera brings together management, operational efficiency, payment diversity, data security, and customer loyalty solutions on a single platform. It simplifies businesses' financial processes, reduces operational burdens with innovative technologies, and maximizes efficiency. Whether you are a small business or a large corporation, discover our end-to-end solutions for all your financial needs, explore the future of B2B fintech experience, and take your business processes into the future! 🚀 If you want to join us on Nakitera's growth journey, we are waiting for your applications for our " Backend Developer " position. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field, Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and design principles (SOLID, Clean Code, pragmatic design patterns), 5+ years of backend experience with Java and Spring Boot (or similar JVM-based frameworks), Hands-on experience with RESTful API design and development, Familiarity with SOAP and XML technologies, Experience with RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar messaging systems, Experience in the payments/fintech domain is a strong plus, Experience with Unit Test Frameworks, Experience with AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT) is a plus. Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable, high-performance backend services, Develop and enhance robust backend systems and APIs, Build and manage integrations related to payment systems and financial services, Apply best practices such as clean code and design principles to ensure high code quality, Maintain and optimize existing systems for performance, reliability, and scalability, Troubleshoot, debug, and improve system stability, Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing within the team. We eagerly await your applications. Nakitera People Team

title: Backend Engineer
description: We are looking for an Odealist to create value together! We work in a world where new ideas, bold steps, and learning happen every day. At Odeabank, we measure success not only by results but also by learning, growing, and creating value. We work in a culture that is collaborative, innovative, and open to different perspectives. Everd day, we move forward together for a better experience and a stronger future. What Can You Expect? A culture that supports your development: Training, mentoring, and continuous learning opportunities Working model: A hybrid environment that offers both productivity and balance Inclusive team structure: An organizational culture shaped by openness, respect, authenticity, and enthusiasm Sustainable vision: Commitment to gender equality, diversity, and sustainability Supportive leadership: Managers who value your ideas and encourage sharing About the Role Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or related -fields 4+ years of experience as Software Development, preferably in banking and finance industry Good knowledge and experience in Asp.net MVC, C#, Web API, Entity Framework, .Net Core Good knowledge and experience in SQL queries, Performance Tuning, Transaction Management, Good knowledge of OOP, Design Patterns, Unit Testing Good knowledge of Client Server and N-tier architecture with high-performance requirements Experience with open source software and tools (Elastic Search, Mongo, Redis, etc.) is a plus. Microservice Architecture knowledge is a plus. Docker Container Orchestration: Kubernetes (OpenShift) knowledge is a plus Continuous Deployment frameworks (ArgoCD, JenkinsX, ...) knowledge is a plus. General Qualifications: Continues to learn while sharing their experience, Can communicate effectively in teamwork, Follows innovations and adapts quickly to change, Reflects analytical thinking and problem-solving skills in their work, A proactive and solution-oriented professional who contributes to the corporate culture. Benefits: Private Mixed Health Insurance for you and (if applicable) your spouse and children Corporate Life Insurance Remote Work Support Meal Allowance Birthday Leave Shuttle Service for Head Office Employees- (Transportation Allowance for Branch Employees) Why Odeabank? Innovative business model focused on investment and technology Odealist teams shaping not only today but also the future Corporate discount agreements with O'Deal Social events, clubs, and employee communities Special occasion celebrations Recognition and reward mechanisms that regularly highlight achievements Well-being seminars If you want to grow in an Odealist culture , complete your application now and join us on our journey! 💫 *The hiring process at Odeabank includes Human Resources Assessment, relevant manager interviews, and competency-based evaluations. The offer process begins for candidates who successfully complete all stages. **Under the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698, your personal data is processed solely for recruitment purposes during the application process. Detailed information can be found at Odeabank Personal Data Protection Disclosure Text.

title: Full-Stack Developer PHP - Laravel Developer
description: Ofis Kültürünü benimsemiş Bakırköy Merkez ofiste görevlendirilmek üzere Full Stack PHP Developer arayışımız vardır. PHP ve Laravel ile en az +5 yıl tecrübeli sıfırdan proje geliştirmiş ve laravel ile geliştirmiş projelere güncelleme geliştirme yapabilecek çözüm odaklı uzun soluklu projelerde yer almış. uzun süre bir ekipte yer almak isteyen adayların başvurmasını rica ederiz. kurtulus@egelinebilgi.net

title: Backend Yazılım Geliştirici PHP / Python / AWS
description: Backend Yazılım Geliştirici (PHP / Python / AWS) Şirketimizin mevcut sistemlerinin sürdürülebilirliğini sağlamak ve yeni nesil bulut tabanlı backend çözümleri geliştirmek üzere deneyimli bir Backend Yazılım Geliştirici (3+ yıl) arayışımız bulunmaktadır. İş Tanımı Mevcut on-premise PHP uygulamalarının bakım, iyileştirme ve hata giderme süreçlerinin yürütülmesi On-premise ortamda çalışan Python (Django) tabanlı mikroservis mimarisine destek verilmesi AWS platformu üzerinde yeni backend servislerinin geliştirilmesi ve devreye alınması Sistem performansı, güvenliği ve sürekliliğinin sağlanması Gerektiğinde projelerin uçtan uca bağımsız şekilde yürütülmesi Aranan Nitelikler PHP ve Python dillerinde backend geliştirme deneyimi Django framework’ü ve tercihen mikroservis mimarileri konusunda bilgi sahibi AWS servisleri (EC2, Lambda, RDS, S3 vb.) hakkında deneyim PostgreSQL, MySQL ve DynamoDB veritabanları ile çalışma tecrübesi On-premise sistemler ile çalışma deneyimi Yazılım geliştirme prensipleri, temiz kod ve sürdürülebilirlik konularında yetkinlik Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerileri gelişmiş Bağımsız çalışabilme ve sorumluluk alabilme yetkinliği Tercih Sebepleri Yapay zeka destekli geliştirme araçlarını etkin şekilde kullanabilme CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi Docker ve container teknolojileri ile deneyim Legacy sistemlerin modernizasyonu konusunda tecrübe Genel Nitelikler Adayın, verilen görevleri sahiplenerek sonuç odaklı şekilde ilerleyebilen, teknik olarak yetkin ve sorumluluk bilinci yüksek bir profesyonel olması beklenmektedir.

title: Senior Backend Engineer (SaaS/AI · Onsite · Şişli, İstanbul)
description: Apilex is building the infrastructure for how legal work gets done. Our platform is used by lawyers and legal teams across Turkey, Germany, and France, handling real casework, real documents, real deadlines. We are 80+ people, fully bootstrapped, and growing on product revenue alone. No investors setting our priorities. Just a hard problem, a strong product, and a team that ships. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to help us scale the systems behind a platform that is already live across three countries and growing fast. What you'll do Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures that can support a rapidly expanding user base across multiple markets. Own the quality of what gets shipped: lead code reviews, set standards, and be the kind of engineer whose feedback makes the whole team better. Work across a modern backend stack — real-time event streaming, full-text search, hybrid data architectures — and make decisions that hold up at scale. Provide technical mentorship within the team. You have seen things go wrong before, and you help others avoid those paths. Collaborate with the AI and product teams to integrate LLM-powered workflows reliably into production systems. What we're looking for Must-have: 5+ years of backend experience with Java and Spring Boot, or similar JVM-based frameworks. Strong foundation in software architecture design, OOP, SOLID principles, and design patterns at various scales. Production experience with both NoSQL databases (MongoDB or similar) and relational databases (PostgreSQL or similar), with the ability to design hybrid data architectures. Strong knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar search and indexing technologies. Experience with messaging systems such as RabbitMQ or Kafka. Hands-on experience with Redis or similar in-memory caching solutions. Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures. Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and CI/CD pipelines. Nice-to-have: Experience integrating AI or LLM-based components into a production backend. Background in document-heavy or high-correctness domains: legal, compliance, finance, or similar. Experience with multi-language or multi-locale systems. Why Apilex Apilex launched under a year ago. Since then, the team has grown to 80+ people across three countries, funded entirely by product revenue with no external investment. Turkey, Germany, and France are live. Brazil is next. The pace is fast and the standards are high — legal professionals depend on the platform daily and they notice when things break. You will be joining a team that is energetic, direct, and genuinely excited about what they are building. The office is in Bomonti, in the center of Istanbul. If you want to work on systems that are already at scale and still growing, we would like to talk.

title: Full Stack Developer — React Odaklı
description: Proje hakkında Chatier, gerçek zamanlı iletişim teknolojileri alanında faaliyet gösteren, ürün odaklı bir yazılım şirketidir. chatier.app platformu; Node.js, Socket.IO ve React teknolojileri üzerine inşa edilmiş olup 10'dan fazla kişilik bir ar-ge ekibi tarafından Sakarya merkezli olarak geliştirilmektedir. Pozisyon tanımı Chatier olarak, frontend mimarimizi daha ölçeklenebilir, performanslı ve sürdürülebilir bir yapıya taşımak amacıyla ekibimize Full Stack Developer pozisyonunda bir yazılım geliştirici arıyoruz. İlgili pozisyonda React geliştirme süreçleri ön planda olup adayın full stack yetkinliklere sahip olması avantaj olarak değerlendirilecektir. Deneyim seviyesinden bağımsız olarak teknik yetkinlik ve üretilen iş kalitesi esas alınacaktır. Teknoloji yığını React TypeScript Node.js Fastify Socket.IO MongoDB Redis Aranan nitelikler React ekosistemi konusunda ileri düzey bilgi ve uygulama deneyimi (hooks, context API, performans optimizasyonu, component mimarisi) TypeScript ile üretim ortamı geliştirme deneyimi Gerçek zamanlı sistemler ve WebSocket tabanlı mimarilere ilişkin teknik bilgi Kod kalitesi, okunabilirlik ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkelerine bağlı çalışma disiplini Ekip içi code review süreçlerine etkin katılım sağlayabilme kapasitesi Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yetkinliği Tercih edilen nitelikler Zorunlu değildir · Artı puan olarak değerlendirilir CI/CD süreçlerine ilişkin temel düzeyde bilgi ve deneyim (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI veya benzeri araçlar) Docker ve container tabanlı geliştirme ortamlarına aşinalık Linux sistem yönetimi ve komut satırı kullanımı konusunda pratik deneyim Genel koşullar Askerlik görevini tamamlamış olmak veya en az 2 yıl tecil hakkına sahip bulunmak Sakarya ilinde ikamet etmekte olan ya da taşınmaya açık adaylar tercih edilecektir Haftada 3 gün ofis, 2 gün uzaktan çalışma düzenine uyum sağlayabilmek

title: Senior Node.js Backend Developer
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Node.js Backend Developer in Turkey. This is a high-impact opportunity to build and scale backend systems powering a global digital platform at the forefront of financial innovation. In this role, you will design and develop robust, high-performance services that support real-time applications and large-scale user activity. You’ll work in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where autonomy, innovation, and technical excellence are highly valued. From architecting microservices to integrating cutting-edge technologies, your contributions will directly shape the reliability, scalability, and security of mission-critical systems. You’ll collaborate with a global team of experts, continuously learning and pushing technical boundaries. This role is ideal for engineers passionate about distributed systems, performance optimization, and building the future of digital finance. Accountabilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js, ensuring high performance and reliability across critical systems Contribute to the architecture and implementation of microservices-based platforms supporting real-time applications and APIs Build and deploy new features and products using agile methodologies, ensuring seamless user experiences Optimize backend systems for scalability, low latency, and high availability as user demand grows Implement strong security practices across all backend components to safeguard systems and user data Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate databases, third-party services, and blockchain-related technologies Continuously improve system performance, code quality, and development processes through best practices and innovation Requirements Strong expertise in Node.js and JavaScript, with experience building complex backend systems Solid understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems Experience working with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB Proven ability to contribute to large-scale, high-availability platforms Good understanding of backend security principles and best practices Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies in a fast-evolving environment Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to work independently in a remote setup Nice to have: experience with blockchain integrations, Redis or message queues, and languages such as Ruby, Rust, or C++ Benefits Fully remote work environment with flexible working hours Competitive compensation package Opportunities for continuous learning, mentorship, and career growth Exposure to cutting-edge technologies and innovative projects Collaborative, global team culture with strong knowledge-sharing practices Regular team-building activities and social events (virtual and in-person) High-impact role with the opportunity to shape next-generation digital platforms Why Apply Through Jobgether? We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Backend Developer (Remote)
description: About Merzigo Merzigo is a cutting-edge video monetization company, that provides a range of innovative services to broadcasters, producers, and distributors. They focus on supporting leading entertainment brands to grow their AVOD business, finding them new audiences, and increasing revenue streams. Our company is dedicated to inclusion, diversity, and equality. By bringing together individuals with various backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives, we aim to create an innovative and dynamic work environment. Everyone must feel valued and respected, as this is a crucial component in strengthening team spirit. We strive to give all our employees equal opportunities to reach their full potential in an inclusive atmosphere. Requirements Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or Computer Science. At least 8 years of software development experience, Minimum of 2 years of DevOps experience, Proficiency in .NET Core, C#, ASP.NET MVC, and Web API, with hands-on project experience. Experience with frontend technologies such as React.js is a plus, Strong knowledge of OOP/AOP, Design Patterns, and SOLID principles, Familiarity with DDD, CQRS, CQRS/ES, Clean Architecture, Event-Driven Architecture, FluentValidation, MediatR, and Dapper, Experience in developing according to microservice architecture and coding standards, Proficiency in developing API Gateways using Ocelot, Experience in building background job and scheduling systems such as Hangfire, Familiarity with ORM tools such as Entity Framework, Experience with NoSQL technologies such as Redis, MongoDB, and Elasticsearch, Proficiency in RDBMS technologies such as MSSQL, PostgreSQL, and MySQL, Familiarity with messaging technologies such as RabbitMQ and Kafka, Experience with software development, CI/CD, code quality, and source control tools such as Git, TFS, Bitbucket, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, and SonarQube, Experience with real-time communication technologies such as SignalR, Knowledge of coding standards, secure coding practices, cybersecurity principles, and mitigation of attacks such as DDoS and brute-force attacks, Hands-on experience using AI-assisted development tools in daily software engineering workflows, Experience working in Agile environments using Scrum and adhering to SDLC processes. Responsibilities Participate in product development, integration, and deployment processes, Collaborate effectively with team members to develop efficient and high-quality code, Contribute to technical documentation, Write unit tests for developed modules, Deliver challenging projects on time while maintaining high-quality standards and alignment with the product roadmap, Ensure customer satisfaction, Monitor the successful completion of processes such as testing and deployment, and take necessary actions to resolve any issues that arise, Generate new ideas to develop new applications or improve existing applications and processes; develop PoC (Proof of Concept) applications when necessary to demonstrate these ideas, Research new technologies and share knowledge, ideas, and innovations with the team, Actively use AI-assisted development tools (e.g., code generation, code review support, and test generation) as part of day-to-day software development. We welcome candidates who share this mission to join us.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Node.js)
company: TalenTown İnsan Kaynakları - İşe Alım Ajansı
description: About the Role As a Senior Software Engineer, you will be responsible for building clean and effective APIs for our user interface. By working with a team, this candidate will understand needs from the product management, engineering, and business stakeholders and will be able to build solutions that fit those needs. What You Will Do Design, develop and enhance efficient APIs Implement new designs and improve the architecture in our current and new products Working with the front-end developers to ensure that the required data is available Helping the current engineering process by code reviews, pull requests etc Analyze the impact of features, hypothesize and implement new solutions What We Are Looking For Qualifications 6+ years overall professional web application development experience (preferably with Node.js) 4+ years production experience in working with various Javascript libraries - Express (preferred), Hapi, Sails, Nest etc. Excellent knowledge of contemporary Javascript (ES6+) Familiarity with relational and non-relational databases, key-value stores and search engines (PostgreSQL, Microsoft SQL Server, BigQuery, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch etc) Good knowledge of OOP, design patterns, asynchronous programming, microservices, concurrency, and transactions Strong communication skills Preferred Qualifications Experience with unit and end-to-end testing Experience with Typescript Experience with large and complex datasets Experience with Serverless & Amazon AWS Track record of contributing to open source repositories Basic understanding of HTML5/CSS
